stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, verification, or manifest change after this review invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a new independent review run.
Any later reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the whole immutable batch.
notes: Independent mechanical review passed at exact HEAD d8ea08225a058b2668f5d8b74d786c334797c614. All 488 frozen fixtures and 644 independently authored fresh probes produced the expected grammar-only outcomes across feature-interface, bug-investigation, and staged-migration families. The probe matrix covered Setext and alternate markers, explicit links versus reference/autolink/image/HTML/code lookalikes, wrong-section content, nested and marker-empty structures, quote-divider order, global H3 occurrence safety, closed block sequences, and empty tagged fences. Current boundaries are recorded rather than overstated: hidden-comment-only list items count as nonempty source, link destinations are checked for nonemptiness rather than semantic validity, empty language-tagged fences satisfy the fenced-code predicate, and wording, spelling, technical truth, command usefulness, and command execution remain outside grading.
